studyName: A Phase I Study of the Treatment of Recurrent Malignant Glioma with CAN-3110 (AKA rQNestin34.5v.2), a Genetically Engineered HSV-1 Virus

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Patient age at time of trial enrollment in years.

variables.name: Cohort
variables.description: Cohort of the clinical trial in which the patient was enrolled.

variables.name: Deceased
variables.description: Flag to indicate if patient is deceased (1) or alive (0) at time of last follow up.

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Patient biological gender.

variables.name: Grade
variables.description: Tumor grade.

variables.name: IDH
variables.description: Tumor IDH mutation status.

variables.name: KPS
variables.description: Karnofsky performance status score at the time of trial enrollment.

variables.name: MGMT
variables.description: Tumor MGMT methylation status.

variables.name: PFU_CAN3110
variables.description: Dose of CAN3110 (aka rQNestin) virus used to treat this patient in plaque-forming units (PFU).

variables.name: Pathological_Diagnosis_at_time_of_injection
variables.description: Pathological diagnosis at time of CAN3110 injection as defined by 2021 classifications.

variables.name: Pathology_CD20_post_Perinecrotic_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD20+ cells observed in the perinecrotic region per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD20_post_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD20+ cells observed per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD20_pre_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD20+ cells observed per mm^3 in the pre-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD4_post_Perinecrotic_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD4+ cells observed in the perinecrotic region per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD4_post_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD4+ cells observed per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD4_pre_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD4+ cells observed per mm^3 in the pre-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD8_post_Perinecrotic_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD8+ cells observed in the perinecrotic region per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD8_post_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD8+ cells observed per mm^3 in the post-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_CD8_pre_n_per_mm3
variables.description: Number of CD8+ cells observed per mm^3 in the pre-CAN3110 pathology sample.

variables.name: Pathology_HSV_Post_CAN3110_Day_Positive
variables.description: The day (post CAN3110 injection) on which tissue was collected which tested HSV positive. If positive testing was obtained on multiple days, the latest positive timepoint is recorded. If all samples were negative, the earliest negative timepoint is recorded.

variables.name: Pathology_HSV_Post_CAN3110_Detail
variables.description: HSV1 IHC staining for post-treatment tumor samples. "Positive", "Multifocal", "Focal", or "Weak"  if patient had any post-treatment tumor samples with those staining calls, with same order of precedence. "Negative" if patient had  one or more post-treatment samples tested for HSV via IHC and all results were negative. NA if no post-treatment samples were tested for HSV staining via IHC for that patient.

variables.name: Pathology_Post_Sample_Days_post_CAN3110
variables.description: Timepoint at which post-CAN3110 pathology sample was collected as measured in days post-CAN3110 injection. When multiple timepoints were available, the timepoint with the highest number of CD4 + CD8 cells was selected.

variables.name: Pathology_Pre_Sample_Days_post_CAN3110
variables.description: Timepoint at which pre-CAN3110 pathology sample was collected as measured in days post-CAN3110 injection.

variables.name: Pathology_Tissue_Source_post
variables.description: Source of post-treatment tumor tissue for pathology data.

variables.name: Pathology_Tissue_Source_pre
variables.description: Source of pre-treatment tumor tissue for pathology data.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_HSV1_Blood_PCR
variables.description: Detectability of HSV1 in blood via PCR after CAN3110 treatment.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_HSV1_Serology_Status
variables.description: HSV1 serology status after treatment with CAN3110.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_HSV2_Blood_PCR
variables.description: Detectability of HSV2 in blood via PCR after CAN3110 treatment.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_HSV2_Serology_Status
variables.description: HSV2 serology status after treatment with CAN3110.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_PFS_Days
variables.description: Number of days from CAN3110 treatment to patient disease progression or death.  This day was defined as earliest date of: 1) Death; 2) First new treatment following CAN-3110; or 3) First MRI Progression after CAN-3110. Note that only MRI's taken at least 14 days post CAN-3110 were considered. Also note that the following therapies were excluded from consideration when determining first new treatment: Dexamethasone, Wound Exploration, CSF Wound Drain, Bevacizumab, Cranial Wound Washout, and Biopsy. Note that PFS dates for cohort B patient are preliminary.

variables.name: Post_CAN3110_Survival_Days
variables.description: Number of days patient survived from time of CAN3110 treatment to death or last follow up.

variables.name: Pre_CAN3110_HSV1_Serology_Status
variables.description: HSV1 serology status prior to treatment with CAN3110 (which is a modified HSV1).

variables.name: Pre_CAN3110_HSV2_Serology_Status
variables.description: HSV2 serology status prior to treatment with CAN3110 (which is a modified HSV2).

variables.name: Reason_for_Death
variables.description: Flag indicating if patient's death was cancer or non-cancer related.

variables.name: Recurrence_number_at_CAN3110_Injection
variables.description: Number of tumor recurrences for patient prior to enrollment in CAN3110 trial.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: Time_From_Diagnosis_to_CAN3110_Days
variables.description: Number of days from initial tumor diagnosis to CAN3110 treatment.

variables.name: Tumor_Volume_at_CAN3110_Injection_mm3
variables.description: Volume of patient's tumor at time of CAN3110 injection in mm^3.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_TIMEPOINT
variables.description: Timepoint at which tissue sample was collected, counted as days after CAN-3110 injection. Note that "28retreat" samples index this value based on the day of patient 28's second CAN-3110 injection, which occurred 259 days after the first CAN-3110 injection.

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
